meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome debugging hurdles. A practical, intermediate-level guide for students using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Debugging paralysis happens when you lack structural visibility. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you enforce modular architecture, making bugs easier to isolate. Combined with Claude Code's iterative analysis, you transform chaotic codebases into predictable, testable systems. Stop guessing; start diagnosing with systemic, AI-assisted architectural patterns designed for production-grade reliability.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in a void. You have spent hours staring at a stack trace that refuses to resolve, your logic tangled in a web of dependencies you no longer recognize. This is the 'debugging wall'—a rite of passage that feels like a dead end for every student developer. It is not a lack of intelligence; it is a lack of systemic framework.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This isn't just boilerplate; it is a battle-tested architecture designed to make your code transparent. By shifting your approach from 'fixing lines' to 'debugging systems,' you will reclaim your flow and build with the confidence of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure clear separation of concerns, which is the first step in making bugs visible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure using the Antigravity standard template with strict modular separation for business logic and UI.

steps.title: Map Your Dependency Graph
steps.description: Use AI to visualize where data flows and where it breaks, turning opaque errors into clear path traces.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project dependencies and generate a Mermaid diagram identifying potential circular references causing runtime failures.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Apply a divide-and-conquer strategy by creating an isolated test scaffold for the failing module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an isolated unit test scaffold for the failing service module using the Antigravity test-first pattern.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Error Handling
steps.description: Inject robust error boundaries that provide actionable logs rather than silent failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current catch blocks to implement Antigravity error-boundary patterns, ensuring stack traces include state snapshots.

steps.title: Automated Regression Verification
steps.description: Ensure the fix holds across the entire codebase by running your new test suite through the AI agent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run all tests against the refactored code and verify that the specific debugging issue is resolved without regressions.

pro_tips: Always commit your state before using Claude Code to refactor so you can utilize git-bisect if the AI takes an unexpected turn.
Use the Antigravity 'State-Inspector' middleware to log your variable changes in real-time, preventing 'heisenbugs' that vanish when you look at them.
Treat your error logs as data: Feed the raw logs directly into Claude Code to identify patterns, not just individual syntax errors.
Maintain a 'Decision Log' markdown file in your root folder; ask the AI to summarize why it chose a specific refactor path.
Focus on 'immutability' in your data structures; 80% of student debugging issues disappear when you stop mutating objects in place.
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, move from local debugging to CI/CD integration. Use your new Antigravity template to build a secondary micro-service to practice inter-service communication.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the architecture to stop struggling and start shipping. Don't let your code sit in a broken state for another hour. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
